completionSupport.source: Table View Valkey completion uses the proven local-runtime command rows only.
completionSupport.nonClaim: Completion is not Runtime Happy Path smoke, direct mutation UI, broader command-family runtime promotion, or full Valkey compatibility evidence.

matrixScope: Redis-compatible command-family matrix for Table View's bounded Redis command slice, with focused local Valkey testcontainer proof for selected rows and editor-assistance completion for proven rows only. This is not Runtime Happy Path smoke, direct mutation UI, or full Valkey compatibility evidence.
detectionRules: Do not identify Valkey by redis_version alone; future broader runtime promotion must use server_name/valkey_version or HELLO server/version evidence.
Do not reuse Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke as Valkey evidence.
Do not widen Valkey runtime or command-family claims beyond local Valkey evidence recorded by this matrix.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: profile identity plus local Valkey container execution path; broader identity detection still needs Valkey-specific server fields.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey can expose Redis-compatible identity fields for client compatibility, so redis_version is not enough to prove a broader Valkey runtime.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: broader Valkey runtime promotion must record Valkey-specific server identity before any Redis-compatible behavior is widened.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat a Redis-looking server identity or Redis service smoke as Valkey support.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers DB 2 connection/listing, bounded key scan, and typed value preview through the Valkey adapter.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Runtime proof is local-first focused evidence, not Runtime Happy Path smoke or broader compatibility proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: Valkey smoke must prove the same path in CI before it becomes Runtime Happy Path evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not use Redis scan/key metadata smoke as Valkey keyspace evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers string typed value preview through the Valkey adapter.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: GET command-editor dispatch is not separately promoted beyond the typed value preview proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: Valkey smoke or focused command evidence must prove command-editor GET dispatch before claiming that path.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis GET command UI evidence as Valkey command-editor proof.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers SET with EX through bounded command query dispatch and tabular projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: SET NX/XX and broader string option policy are not proven by this focused slice.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: broader Valkey string write support must add option-specific runtime evidence and docs.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis string write option coverage without Valkey-specific tests.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers HGETALL command dispatch and tabular hash field projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Hash write behavior, binary values, and ordering-sensitive projections remain outside this proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: broader Valkey hash support must add write/runtime projection evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis hash UI or mutation evidence as Valkey hash write proof.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for HSET dispatch or hash mutation projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Hash write projection and binary field behavior require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove hash write projection with the bounded UI/API contract.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis HSET support as Valkey hash mutation evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for bounded list ranges.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: List range bounds and result ordering require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove non-negative bounded ranges and list projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not claim Valkey list parity from Redis allowlist coverage alone.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for list push result semantics.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: List write result projection and refresh behavior require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove list push projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis list write support without Valkey runtime evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for set member projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Set member ordering and projection require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove set read projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat static set fixture inventory as live Valkey support.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for set write projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Set write result projection and refresh behavior require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove set write projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis set write support without Valkey runtime evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for sorted-set range projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Scores, WITHSCORES projection, and ordering behavior require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove sorted-set read projection with score handling.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis sorted-set projection claims without Valkey runtime evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for sorted-set write projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Sorted-set write result projection and score handling require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove sorted-set write projection with score handling.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not inherit Redis sorted-set write support without Valkey runtime evidence.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: No local Valkey command-runtime evidence exists for TTL read result projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: TTL timing tolerance and state labels require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove TTL read labels and timing tolerance.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis TTL timing evidence for Valkey.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers EXPIRE command dispatch and exact-key PERSIST confirmation through the bounded command policy.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: TTL read labels and post-mutation UI refresh remain outside this focused proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: Valkey smoke must prove the same path before it becomes Runtime Happy Path evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not reuse Redis TTL confirmation evidence for Valkey.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers bounded XRANGE command dispatch and stream result projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Stream write and consumer-group behavior remain outside this proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: broader Valkey stream support must add workflow-specific runtime evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not claim Valkey stream consumer support from XRANGE proof.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Valkey seed setup uses XADD, but Table View command-runtime dispatch for XADD is not promoted.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Stream write result projection and consumer semantics require separate Valkey evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: local Valkey focused evidence must prove stream write projection before stream write support is claimed.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not claim Valkey stream write support from static seed/setup commands.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Local Valkey testcontainer covers exact-key DEL confirmation and command projection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Missing-key projection and key browser refresh are not promoted by this focused proof.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: Valkey smoke must prove browser refresh before this becomes Runtime Happy Path evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not enable broad or multi-key destructive Valkey commands because single-key DEL is proven.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Rejected by bounded command policy; local Valkey testcontainer verifies FLUSHDB rejection.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey server-control and protocol-push behaviors are not part of Table View's KV product slice.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: separate admin/safety PR with explicit UX, confirmation policy, and Valkey runtime evidence.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not allow admin or broad destructive commands just because a Valkey server accepts Redis-compatible command names.

commandFamilyMatrix.currentEvidence: Rejected by Redis bounded command policy; Valkey has no UI/runtime support for these workflows.
commandFamilyMatrix.knownValkeyDelta: Valkey cluster, pub/sub, scripting, modules/functions, and consumer-group workflows require separate result envelopes, safety policy, and smoke routing.
commandFamilyMatrix.promotionGate: separate workflow-specific PR with command parser ownership, result envelope decision, and Valkey-specific smoke.
commandFamilyMatrix.unsupportedAssumption: Do not treat protocol compatibility as support for asynchronous, scripting, module, cluster, or consumer-group workflows.

knownValkeyDeltas: Valkey identity must be proven with Valkey-specific server fields, not redis_version alone.
Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke is not Valkey runtime evidence.
Static seed/reset commands are fixture inventory only until executed against a local Valkey runtime.
Focused local Valkey testcontainer evidence promotes only the explicitly marked proven command/query families.
Admin, broad destructive, cluster, pub/sub, modules/functions, scripting, and consumer-group workflows remain rejected even if Valkey accepts Redis-compatible command names.
unsupportedRedisAssumptions: Do not reuse Redis Runtime Happy Path smoke as Valkey evidence.
Do not widen Valkey runtime support from profile identity alone.
Do not promote a Redis command family for Valkey until that family has local Valkey runtime evidence and docs.
Do not widen Redis unsupported command families for Valkey without a separate safety and result-envelope decision.
